name: RunPod
blurb: Community + Secure Cloud, with Spot/Interruptible tier

name: Salad
blurb: Distributed consumer-GPU network with priority tiers; vCPU/RAM billed separately

name: Modal
blurb: Serverless, per-second billing

name: Lambda
blurb: On-demand only (no spot)

name: Genesis Cloud
blurb: HGX (8x min) and consumer 1x

name: Hyperstack
blurb: On-demand, per-minute billing, no egress fees

name: GPUHub
blurb: Singapore provider, USD pay-as-you-go

name: Novita
blurb: On-demand + Spot (spot tier typically unavailable in practice)

name: Verda
blurb: Ex-DataCrunch. On-demand + Spot (~65% off)

name: Dataoorts
blurb: 5 series: X-Series (VM), Nova (NVLink), Atlas (Blackwell HPC), Orion, Yotta. Free vCPU/RAM. Dynamic pricing every ~18h.

name: Spheron
blurb: Decentralized marketplace; cheapest-live-offer pricing

name: Packet.ai
blurb: On-demand only (no spot, no cluster minimums)

name: Vultr
blurb: Cloud GPU + Bare Metal, on-demand only

name: DigitalOcean
blurb: GPU Droplets, on-demand, includes egress

name: Jarvis Labs
blurb: On-demand + Spot (up to -56%, exact spot price not published)

name: Qubrid
blurb: On-demand only, per-second billing

name: Vast.ai
blurb: Marketplace — listed prices volatile; cheapest live offer often unreachable when provisioning

name: Akash
blurb: Decentralized marketplace (Cosmos blockchain), on-demand only

name: CoreWeave
blurb: Classic (1x GPU public) and cluster (8x min)

name: TensorDock
blurb: Marketplace; on-demand only listed (page may be stale)

name: Thunder Compute
blurb: GPU virtualization. Prototyping (shared) + Production (dedicated)
